label: Flood/Water group average per-claim severity (column reading A)
source_denominator_or_scope: PV insurance claims 2014-2019; Flood/Water group; n=197 (reading A)
caveats: Column-alignment ambiguity in source PDF; reading A may actually be the Theft/Vandalism column. Not per-MW; no capacity denominator.

label: Flood/Water group maximum per-claim severity (column reading A)
source_denominator_or_scope: PV insurance claims 2014-2019; Flood/Water group; n=197 (reading A)
caveats: Column-alignment ambiguity; carry both readings. Not per-MW.

label: Flood/Water group average per-claim severity (column reading B)
source_denominator_or_scope: PV insurance claims 2014-2019; Flood/Water group; n=79 (reading B)
caveats: Column-alignment ambiguity in source PDF; original table must be visually re-checked. Not per-MW.

label: Flood/Water group maximum per-claim severity (column reading B)
source_denominator_or_scope: PV insurance claims 2014-2019; Flood/Water group; n=79 (reading B)
caveats: Column-alignment ambiguity; carry both readings. Not per-MW.

label: NatCat (incl. flood) share of solar claims quantum (Australia)
source_denominator_or_scope: Australian solar claims; NatCat bucket includes flood plus other perils
caveats: NatCat bucket bundles flood with other perils; not flood-only. Contractor error ~68% is the larger solar driver.

label: Flood/heavy-rain share of weather-related construction claims by frequency
source_denominator_or_scope: construction-phase CAR/DSU; wind+solar combined
caveats: Construction phase and mixed technology (wind+solar); not operational solar.

label: Flood/heavy-rain share of weather-related construction claims by cost
source_denominator_or_scope: construction-phase CAR/DSU; wind+solar combined
caveats: Construction phase, mixed technology; pair with 18% frequency for severity multiplier.

label: Implied flood severity multiplier (cost share / frequency share)
source_denominator_or_scope: construction-phase CAR/DSU; wind+solar combined
caveats: Derived ratio of the two GCube shares; construction phase; directional only.

label: Storm+hail share of solar PV claim values (bounds flood residual)
source_denominator_or_scope: solar PV property claims; storm+hail bundled; flood in residual
caveats: Flood is inside the ~20% residual, not separately quantified; upper bound only.

label: Flood share of solar ground-up portfolio losses
source_denominator_or_scope: 13,000+ asset-years; 92 GW DC; ~$100B TIV; all 50 states; 2012-2025
caveats: Flood is a very small share of solar losses in this portfolio; aggregate over 13 years.

label: Derived flood aggregate loss (0.197% of ~$1.5B ground-up)
source_denominator_or_scope: 0.197% x ~$1.5B ground-up solar losses; 2012-2025 portfolio
caveats: Portfolio 13-year aggregate, not per-event or per-project severity.

label: Derived flood loss per MW DC across portfolio (13-yr aggregate)
reported_unit: derived aggregate dollars per MW DC
source_denominator_or_scope: ~$3M / 92,000 MW DC; 2012-2025 aggregate
caveats: Illustrative only: 13-year aggregate spread over full 92 GW DC portfolio; not a per-event severity.

label: First Solar v. Zurich asserted flood loss
source_denominator_or_scope: named litigation; ~13 ft flood depth; >$141.9M value in place; MW not stated
caveats: Asserted amount (press cited >$13M); no MW capacity to normalize; gross basis.

label: First Solar v. Zurich sum of five per-event amounts
caveats: Sum of five separately-adjusted events; per-event deductible applied to each.

label: First Solar v. Zurich amount actually paid
source_denominator_or_scope: $200,000 x 3 events after $2.5M per-event flood deductible
caveats: Large gross loss, small net recovery: deductible structure dominates. No MW.

label: First Solar v. Zurich per-event flood deductible
source_denominator_or_scope: flood sublimit/deductible in dispute
caveats: Per-event flood deductible; central to why net recovery was small.

label: South Alexander v. Markel physical damage claim (Hurricane Ida)
source_denominator_or_scope: named litigation; Hurricane Ida flood; MW not stated
caveats: No MW capacity to normalize; physical-damage basis; hurricane-driven flood.

label: South Alexander v. Markel business-interruption limit
source_denominator_or_scope: BI sublimit on same Hurricane Ida claim
caveats: Policy limit, not incurred BI loss.

label: Puerto Rico solar contingent business interruption loss
source_denominator_or_scope: named solar CBI loss; Puerto Rico; MW not stated
caveats: Order-of-magnitude CBI figure; not physical damage; no MW.

label: DEPCOM 92-MW flood response avoided loss
source_denominator_or_scope: 92 MW site; 10 of 40 PCS affected; 12-18 in standing water
caveats: Source cites $2.5M-$6.5M saved inconsistently; avoided loss is not incurred damage.

label: DEPCOM 92-MW flood response salvage value
source_denominator_or_scope: 92 MW site flood response
caveats: Salvage figure, not a loss; part of an internally inconsistent case narrative.

label: Derived avoided-loss per MW (DEPCOM 92 MW)
source_denominator_or_scope: $4M avoided / 92 MW
caveats: Illustrative only: avoided loss (not incurred damage) divided by nameplate MW; source dollars self-inconsistent.

label: New England Solar derived business-interruption loss per MW
source_denominator_or_scope: A$30M lost earnings / 400 MW project
caveats: BI/delay basis, not physical damage; AUD not USD, so not normalized to USD/MW here.

label: Valdora 15-MW flood physical damage per MW (zero-loss anchor)
source_denominator_or_scope: 15 MW site; major flood; ~1.2 m freeboard; ~13-day precautionary outage
caveats: Genuine measured zero (not N/A): well-elevated site took a major flood with no physical damage.

label: Solar farm flood AAL change from exposure disaggregation
source_denominator_or_scope: 2,700-acre reservoir-adjacent solar site; relative change only
caveats: Relative delta; absolute AAL dollars are gated. Windstorm moved only +2% on same site.

label: Solar farm windstorm AAL change from exposure disaggregation
source_denominator_or_scope: same 2,700-acre solar site; relative change only
useful_for: contrast peril for flood AAL delta
caveats: Context row: shows flood AAL is far more geolocation-sensitive than windstorm.

label: AAL reduction from +1 ft freeboard (generic curves)
source_denominator_or_scope: generic building depth-damage curves; max AAL 11.21% -> 2.002%
caveats: Generic (non-solar) building curves; freeboard is the flood analog to hail stow.

label: AAL reduction moving design inundation point -0.5 to 0 ft
source_denominator_or_scope: generic building depth-damage curves
caveats: Generic building curves; directional evidence for elevation benefit at solar sites.

label: Modeled flood depth commonly treated as unsuitable for solar siting
source_denominator_or_scope: developer/EDF-style siting screen
caveats: Screening heuristic, not a loss; hazard axis input to any damage function.

label: FM Global critical-equipment elevation guidance
source_denominator_or_scope: solar/electrical property protection standard
caveats: Engineering guidance; flood failure unit is electrical/BOS, not module glass.

label: IPX7 immersion survival threshold for enclosed equipment
source_denominator_or_scope: ingress-protection standard for PV junction boxes/enclosures
caveats: Depth-and-duration threshold behind any solar flood depth-damage assumption; not financial.

label: JRC North America Industrial damage factor at 1.0 m depth
source_denominator_or_scope: JRC 2017 global industrial depth-damage curve; generic proxy
caveats: Generic industrial curve, NOT solar-calibrated; mechanism-shape reference only. Superseded on the crosswalk hazard axis by the canonical flood_solar per-failure-unit depth->DR curve from Damage_Modeling.

label: First Street average property flood AAL (generic, non-solar)
source_denominator_or_scope: 5.7M U.S. properties at substantial risk; $20.3B/yr aggregate
caveats: Residential/commercial buildings, not solar; ~2x USACE; do not treat as a solar benchmark.

label: NFIP average flood claim severity (generic, non-solar)
source_denominator_or_scope: NFIP building/contents claims 2016-2021 average
caveats: Building/contents flood claims, not solar; caps $250K/$100K res, $500K/$500K commercial.
